0 1

Output
0 XNOR13 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
1 XNOR24 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR35 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
3 XNOR46 = XNOR(1,0) = 0

5 NOT6 = NOT(0) = 1
